name: Chorus Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.1450, stop A$7.7022, target A$9.4734 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
